block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Twitter Inc. suffered a major outage Thursday, blocking access to thousands of users. Now the services are restored for most of the users. Two days earlier, on Tuesday, Twitter sued Elon Musk in Delaware Chancery Court to force him to follow through on the $44 billion takeovers he agreed to in April and last week said he wanted to walk away from.
block_07: The share price rose by 18% this week after the company launched its much-awaited online marketplace for NFTs – this development is a part of the efforts to benefit from the adoption of blockchain technology.
block_10: The company has developed a virtual reality-based experience that can make two people across the world from one another seem like they are in the same room. However, the share price fell by almost 18% this week.
